title: Irish Beetroot Gratin
description: A hearty and comforting dish that combines the sweetness of beetroot with the richness of a gratin topping.
instructions: Peel and slice the beetroot into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
In a large saucepan, combine the sliced beetroot, butter, garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the beetroot is tender and lightly caramelized.
Transfer the beetroot mixture to a baking dish and top with grated cheese, breadcrumbs, and a splash of milk.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is heated through.
Serve the gratin hot, topped with roasted potatoes and a dollop of rich cream if desired.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
